name: Verify Email
description: Email verification for new user accounts. Copy varies by UserInvite context (event, asset/tutorial, course, cohort, or generic).

variables.name: CONTEXT_TYPE
variables.description: Active invite context: event, asset, course, cohort, or generic

variables.name: CONTEXT_NAME
variables.description: Human-readable title for the active context (Event.title, Asset.title, course/cohort name). Use {CONTEXT_NAME} in variant overrides.

variables.name: subject
variables.description: Final email subject after variant resolution (also set as SUBJECT)
variables.source: Picked from the active variant after academy overrides
variables.example: Finish setup to join the "Intro to Python Workshop" event

variables.name: MESSAGE
variables.description: Final email body paragraph after variant resolution
variables.source: Picked from the active variant after academy overrides
variables.example: To join the "Intro to Python Workshop" event, set a password and validate your 4Geeks account.

variables.name: SUBJECT_EVENT
variables.description: Subject override for event signups. Supports {CONTEXT_NAME}.
variables.example: Finish setup to join the "{CONTEXT_NAME}" event

variables.name: MESSAGE_EVENT
variables.description: Body override for event signups. Supports {CONTEXT_NAME}.
variables.example: To join the "{CONTEXT_NAME}" event, set a password and validate your account.

variables.name: SUBJECT_ASSET
variables.description: Subject override for asset/tutorial signups. Supports {CONTEXT_NAME}.

variables.name: MESSAGE_ASSET
variables.description: Body override for asset/tutorial signups. Supports {CONTEXT_NAME}.
variables.example: To open "{CONTEXT_NAME}", set a password and validate your account.

variables.name: SUBJECT_COURSE
variables.description: Subject override for course signups. Supports {CONTEXT_NAME}.

variables.name: MESSAGE_COURSE
variables.description: Body override for course signups. Supports {CONTEXT_NAME}.
variables.example: To access "{CONTEXT_NAME}", set a password and validate your account.

variables.name: SUBJECT_COHORT
variables.description: Subject override for cohort signups. Supports {CONTEXT_NAME}.

variables.name: MESSAGE_COHORT
variables.description: Body override for cohort signups. Supports {CONTEXT_NAME}.
variables.example: To access "{CONTEXT_NAME}", set a password and validate your account.
